MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT DOUGLAS MOX's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Douglas Mox's unopposed motion to allow attorney James Czodli to appear pro hac vice is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Cindee F. Mayfield; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CFM)
